title: After-Action Report — FA signing actually signs, clickable free agents, list pagination
scope: Four complaints about the free-agent / college-prospect tooling, all real:

rationale.item: Free agents weren't clickable, and even if they had been, the card 404'd. `free_agents.html` rendered names as plain text, and `player_detail`'s `JOIN teams` was an *inner* join — so any player with `team_id IS NULL` (every FA) returned no row and 404'd.

"Run signing round" was a permanent no-op. The eligibility gate was `active_count < ROSTER_TARGET (34)`, but seeded teams already carry ~42–44 active players, so *no team was ever eligible* and nobody — prospects or veterans — ever signed.
The college Draft Board, Prospect Index, and Import list dumped hundreds of unpaginated rows.

delegation_events.decision: Rework of signing-round eligibility and prospect signing rules
Cap raise, under-21 exclusion, prospects always sign ignoring cap and budget

actions.description: Free-agent player names now link to player cards
player_detail JOIN teams changed to LEFT JOIN; dropped `t.id as team_id` alias so player['team_id'] keeps the player's own (NULL) value
Breadcrumb and header guard on player.team_id: rostered players link to team; FAs get a 'Free Agents' breadcrumb and a Free Agent badge instead of a broken team_detail link

Signing round rework: cap raised to 50 (SIGNING_ROSTER_CAP), under-21 players don't count against the cap, prospects always sign ignoring cap and budget (allow_overdraft=True), veterans keep original cap + budget gating, distribution via _team_valuation_noisefree position-need term
New shared pagination macro `pager(endpoint, args, page, page_count)`

college_draft_view, college_import_view, college_prospects now slice to 50/page, pass page/page_count/pager_args; Draft Board and Import slice before per-row report processing; Prospect Index passes rank_offset

risk_posture: **Cap raised to 50** (`SIGNING_ROSTER_CAP`), separate from the auction's re-roster target so raising it here doesn't perturb the auction.
Everything downstream already tolerates a NULL team (splits return nothing, transfer-target list shows all teams, league badge is skipped).

validation_claims.claim: Seeded a 30-team DB + college tier, ran a rollover to produce 1,560 graduates, and drove the live app: FA name links resolve; an FA player card (/player/<fa_id>) returns 200 and shows the Free Agent badge.
validation_claims.check_method: Seed DB, run app, request an FA player page

validation_claims.claim: Draft Board paginates (32 pages), ?position=P → 12 pages, pager links preserve position=P; Import paginates (32 pages); Prospect Index paginates (83 hitter pages / 47 pitcher pages) and page 2 starts at rank 51.
validation_claims.check_method: Drive the live app pages with seeded data

validation_claims.claim: Injected 60 youth FAs (age 18) and zeroed every team's budget; the round signed all 60, driving budgets negative — confirming prospects bypass both the roster cap and the budget.
validation_claims.check_method: Re-run the direct engine signing-round test with zeroed budgets

non_actions.reason: it already does replacement-based claims and was working; the signing-round button is a separate, manual mechanism

non_actions.item: Veteran signing economics, salary values on signed players, or the auction
Prospect-distribution fairness beyond what the valuation need-term gives
non_actions.reason: with budgets exhausted a stress batch of 60 youths concentrated on the highest-need teams (max 14 on one team). That's consistent with the "sign always, over any limits" directive; revisit if distribution matters.

residual_risks: With budgets exhausted a stress batch of 60 youths concentrated on the highest-need teams (max 14 on one team).
open_hooks: Revisit prospect distribution if distribution matters.
section_headers_original: After-Action Report — FA signing actually signs, clickable free agents, list pagination
Clickable free agents → working player cards
parser_notes: Clear AAR. Date from 'Date completed:' line.
